programme.desc: A cattle magnate's ambitious daughter alienates her friends with her single-minded pursuit of wealth as she attempts to fend off the unwanted attentions of greedy oil barons intent on stealing her land. Drama, starring Susan Hayward, Robert Preston, Pedro Armendariz and Lloyd Gough

programme.title: The Million Pound Note (1954)
programme.desc: An eccentric multimillionaire bets his equally rich brother that if a man is known to be wealthy, he can obtain everything he needs on credit. Comedy adapted from a story by Mark Twain, starring Gregory Peck, Jane Griffiths, Joyce Grenfell and Wilfrid Hyde White

programme.title: Robin and Marian (1976)
programme.desc: Outlaw Robin Hood returns to England after the Crusades and goes in search of his beloved Marian, who is now an abbess, and crosses swords once again with old enemy the Sheriff of Nottingham. Medieval adventure, starring Sean Connery, Audrey Hepburn, Robert Shaw, Nicol Williamson, Ronnie Barker, Denholm Elliott and Richard Harris

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen (2003)
programme.desc: Fearless hunter Allan Quatermain teams up with a host of other characters from Victorian literature - including Captain Nemo, the Invisible Man, Tom Sawyer and Dr Jekyll - to put a stop to the nefarious Fantom's evil plot to bring about a world war. Fantasy adventure, based on Alan Moore's comic-book series, starring Sean Connery in his final screen role, Shane West, Stuart Townsend, Richard Roxburgh, Peta Wilson and Tony Curran

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: An American teenager travelling through Europe is abducted by a gang of sex traffickers. However, what the kidnappers do not realise is that the girl's father is a former CIA agent, who employs all his old skills as he searches for the criminals and tries to rescue his daughter. Thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Famke Janssen and Maggie Grace

programme.title: The Shallows (2016)
programme.desc: A surfer strays into the hunting territory of a great white shark, and finds herself stranded on a tiny island a mere 200 yards from the shore. With the deadly aquatic predator between her and the beach and her safe haven slowly disappearing as the tide comes in, she faces a life or death struggle to get safely back to dry land. Thriller, starring Blake Lively and Oscar Jaenada

programme.title: 47 Meters Down (2017)
programme.desc: Two sisters vacationing in Mexico are trapped in a shark cage at the bottom of the ocean. With less than an hour of oxygen left and great white sharks circling nearby, they must fight to survive. Horror, starring Mandy Moore, Claire Holt and Matthew Modine

programme.title: The Belko Experiment (2016)
programme.desc: In a twisted social experiment, 80 Americans are locked in their high-rise corporate office in Bogotá, Colombia, and ordered by an unknown voice coming from the company's intercom system to participate in a deadly game of kill or be killed. Thriller, starring John Gallagher Jr, Adria Arjona, Michael Rooker and Abraham Benrubi

programme.title: Carry On Spying (1964)
programme.desc: A secret formula is stolen by a sinister organisation masterminded by the evil Dr Crow. The British government plans to assign its top agents to deal with the crisis, but owing to staff shortages, has to settle for a bungling spy and his three hapless trainees. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Cribbins, Jim Dale, Eric Barker and Victor Maddern

programme.title: Dragonheart (1996)
programme.desc: A knight sets out to slay a dragon, only to find the unhappy creature is the last of its kind. Forging an unlikely alliance, the pair embark on a mission to rid their kingdom of its tyrannical ruler. Fantasy adventure, starring Dennis Quaid, David Thewlis, Pete Postlethwaite and Julie Christie, with the voice of Sean Connery

programme.title: Bee Movie (2007)
programme.desc: A bee wearies of a life dedicated to producing honey and decides to leave his hive. During his foray into the wider world, he befriends a florist. However, when he realises what becomes of the honey his species toils so hard to make, he resolves to sue the entire human race for stealing from his fellow creatures. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jerry Seinfeld, Renee Zellweger and Chris Rock

programme.title: White Christmas (1954)
programme.desc: A pair of former soldiers start a new career as nightclub entertainers. They try to boost the popularity of their old commanding officer's struggling winter resort in Vermont by staging a series of extravagant shows, with a little help from their former army buddies and a talented singing sister act. Musical, starring Bing Crosby, Danny Kaye, Vera-Ellen, Dean Jagger, Sig Rumann, Mary Wickes, Anne Whitfield and Rosemary Clooney, featuring seasonal songs by Irving Berlin

programme.title: Knight and Day (2010)
programme.desc: A woman has a chance encounter with a rogue secret agent, who has been framed as a traitor and is on the run from his own superiors. Realising she has been mistaken for his accomplice and is in danger for knowing too much, the fugitive kidnaps her and drags her on a dangerous journey around the world, as he sets out to clear his name and protect a vitally important invention. Comedy adventure, with Tom Cruise, Cameron Diaz and Viola Davis

programme.title: Elizabeth (1998)
programme.desc: Elizabeth I rises to the throne of a divided and troubled Britain, and the early years of her reign find her under pressure to marry and produce an heir - while enemies both overseas and within her own court plot to bring about her downfall. Shekhar Kapur's historical drama, starring Cate Blanchett, Geoffrey Rush, Christopher Eccleston and Joseph Fiennes

programme.title: Ouija: Origin Of Evil (2016)
programme.desc: In 1967 Los Angeles, a widowed mother and her two daughters add a new stunt to boost their seance scam business. However, they get more than they bargained for when they invite an evil presence into their home. Supernatural horror prequel, starring Elizabeth Reaser and Annalise Basso

programme.title: Her (2013)
programme.desc: A lonely man in the midst of a divorce downloads an artificial intelligence to act as an operating system for his computer. He finds himself better able to connect to the voice of the system than he can to any human being, and begins to fall in love with it. Romantic drama, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Amy Adams and Rooney Mara, with the voice of Scarlett Johansson

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina goes to a safari park in Florida, where she accidentally turns Valerie and Libby into zebras. Hilda and Zelda conjure up a caveman and Harvey gets a job as a tour guide

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to get her own way by cunningly causing rivalry between Hilda and Zelda _ but succeeds so well that they respond by deciding to live apart, and the entire plan blows up in her face when the witches' council decide she must choose between them

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: The friends head to Minnesota for the funeral of Marshall's father and try to ease the situation as much as possible, but Lily only succeeds in aggravating his widow when she offers support. Meanwhile, Marshall is upset when he remembers the last words his dad said to him

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Marshall finds himself returning to his old ways while staying with his family in Minnesota. Back in New York, Zoey sets Ted up on a date with her naive cousin (guest star Katy Perry) - which leads the architect to an important realisation. Comedy, starring Josh Radnor

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: The family ends up at hospital on Thanksgiving, but Maya's determination to save the holiday leads to an uneasy truce with Melanie. Jimmy is jealous when Kenneth bonds with Billy

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: The DiMeos realise they have great intentions but lack follow-through when it comes to virtually everything. Vowing to change, Ray and Dylan take on government bureaucracy, Kenneth helps JJ prepare for college, and Maya tries to reconnect with Jimmy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is hurt to discover Penny and Bernadette went shopping for bridesmaid dresses without her. She first turns to a reluctant Sheldon for comfort and later tries to drown her sorrows. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny endure an awkward night at the cinema, both insisting the outing is not a date. Meanwhile, a terrified Sheldon enlists his friends' help when a bird flies into his apartment, but his behaviour soon leaves them exasperated. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: With prom night approaching, Adam worries that Brea will ditch him for a more popular guy. Erica struggles with how to support Geoff when he receives bad news

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: First episode of the comedy, focusing on an 11-year-old boy as he captures his family on video camera during the 1980s. Barry wants to start driving on his 16th birthday, but Beverly advises against it and refuses to allow Pops to sell him his old car. Starring Jeff Garlin, Troy Gentile and Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle brings Peralta into a case when a psychiatrist reports one of his patients missing, while Santiago believes she has accidentally received a package meant for Jeffords

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Work has become so busy for Peralta and Santiago that they end up celebrating their first wedding anniversary while standing guard over a comatose drugs baron who has been rushed into hospital after being shot

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's grandmother, known as Meemaw, arrives in Pasadena to visit, but his excitement at her arrival quickly gives way to discomfort when she clashes with Amy. Meanwhile, Raj finds himself drawn to an ambitious female screenwriter he meets at the comic-book store, but Bernadette angrily reminds him he already has a girlfriend. Comedy, guest starring June Squibb

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy host a Valentine's Day episode of Fun with Flags, while Leonard and Penny grapple with getting older. Elsewhere, Howard and Bernadette discover a surprise in their hot tub, and Raj is torn between Emily and a girl he met at the comic book store. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD decides to end his relationship with Danni when she shows him a building where they could live together - but Turk tries to change his mind, and Elliot returns back to her old self after Dr Kelso criticises her new look. Comedy, starring Zach Braff and Tara Reid

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD believes he has found the perfect mentor in surgeon Dr Kevin Casey, who has obsessive-compulsive disorder, while the Janitor and his new assistant help Dr Kelso with a litter problem. Guest starring Michael J Fox, with Zach Braff and Ken Jenkins

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: The DiMeos get together to help JJ shoot a last-minute film for his college application, working against the clock and Maya's best interests. Jimmy makes an awkward gaffe with JJ's beloved. Kenneth and Ray scramble to suppress embarrassing secrets

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Ray's attempt to manipulate Maya over a broken promise of mother-son time backfires when she calls his bluff. JJ tries a new aide after he and Kenneth arrange to spend a day apart. Jimmy can't handle Dylan's teen angst when she invites a boy over

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Competitive juices are flowing as Jake and the squad compete in the second Jimmy Jab Games - a series of eccentric races and contests held in the precinct building

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Amy set to work on an uncrackable case, Holt adjusts to a new beat and Hitchcock looks for the love of his life

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray fall out over Barry's plan to perform his martial arts routine at the annual high school talent show. Pops buys Erica an electric guitar, urging her to take to the stage and sing. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly complains that Pops is spending too much time with her at home, so Murray takes him to work at the furniture shop. Meanwhile, Adam reluctantly gives away his old toys in an effort to make him look more grown up, hoping it will result in a kiss with Dana. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Conflict arises when Leonard's newly divorced parents and Sheldon's devoutly religious mother are all in town at the same time. And when Howard and Raj are contacted about the guidance system they've developed, they assume that the government is out to get them. Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends struggle through an awkward morning after Sheldon's mother and Leonard's father share an evening together. Penny's family arrives in town to attend Penny and Leonard's second wedding ceremony. Keith Carradine, Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mitchell's loved ones panic when he is nowhere to be found. Meanwhile, Kurt returns from his trip to France with his plan to double-cross his friends in full swing

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Aisling Bea leaps cushions and Bob Mortimer educates his rivals on Dumfries and Galloway in the series five final. Presented by Greg Davies and Alex Horne

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Gina spends time with each member of the squad, playing a high-stakes game of chess with Captain Holt, going out for a fancy lunch with Diaz and Santiago, infiltrating an expensive social club with Peralta and finding special gifts for the team

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon takes his new girlfriend on a double date but his principles are tested when she says she will kiss him only if he lets her redesign his wardrobe. Will considers the idea of spending time with a girl he finds embarrassing and boring. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas, Simon Bird and Hannah Tointon

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon joins his girlfriend Tara on a visit to see her sister at university, so the other boys invite themselves along too. Will insists that he wants to look around his last-choice institution, Jay wants to be there to offer sex advice, and Neil's excuse for going is that he has nothing better to do. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas and Hannah Tointon

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Glyn, a 60-year-old disco-dancing entertainer from Essex, hopes to find the perfect partner with whom he can dance off into the sunset. Twenty-eight-year-old Jamie has been on lots of dates, but she keeps meeting cheaters who leave her feeling cold, and needs the show's help to find an honest guy. Presented by Anna Richardson

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard decides to tell his mother that he and Bernadette are engaged - but she later collapses, making him fear the shock of the news has caused her to suffer a heart attack. As the gang convenes at the hospital, Sheldon's fear of infectious diseases lands him in trouble, while Priya and Penny bond over coffee

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette receives her PhD, and the friends then tease Howard about being the only one among them who is not a doctor. Meanwhile, Raj becomes Sheldon's new flatmate after overhearing Leonard and Priya engaging in a Star Trek bedroom fantasy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics share more of their insightful critiques of the week's biggest and best shows, including The Crown, I'm a Celebrity… Get Me Out of Here!, Not the Robbie Williams Christmas Show, The X Factor: The Band, Made in Chelsea: Buenos Aires, and The Apprentice. First shown in December 2019

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina and her new friend Dashiell enter the Other Realm, where they are duped into spreading a series of increasingly outrageous and implausible rumours - all of which start coming true in the mortal world

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: The Witches' Council hand down a devastating decree, forcing Sabrina to choose between Harvey and new love Dashiell, while Salem's mother announces she's coming to visit - unaware he's doomed to spend the next 300 years as a cat. Melissa Joan Hart stars

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney declares February 13 to be a holiday for women with low self-esteem, while Lily has a Valentine's Day surprise for Marshall. Ted and Zoey try to figure out their relationship, and Robin bonds with her single friends. Comedy, starring Neil Patrick Harris

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Marshall resolves to help the environment after being inspired by a documentary, and Ted has an uncomfortable encounter with the Captain - who has not yet realised the architect is going out with Zoey. Meanwhile, Robin suspects Barney has feelings for her friend Nora

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: A Christmas tree fire leads Maya to tell a small lie that has some big consequences. Meanwhile, Ray struggles to live in Pepper's shadow as Dylan twists the knife, and JJ encourages Kenneth to stand up to his sisters. Minnie Driver, John Ross Bowie and Micah Fowler star

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya lends a helping hand to her frenemy Melanie and finds her life taking a surprising turn. Dylan joins the Lafayette High School basketball team, where her lousy sportsmanship gets results. Meanwhile, Jimmy makes up for lost father-son time with Ray

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Comic-book store owner Stuart asks Amy out on a date, forcing a jealous Sheldon to consider the future of his relationship with her. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A day at the roller-skating rink leaves Murray wishing he had not asked Erica to tell him about her life, while Pops steps in to help when a back-to-school shopping trip causes problems between Beverly and Adam. Comedy, starring Jeff Garlin, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry needs the money to buy an expensive new pair of basketball trainers, so Murray hires him to work at his furniture shop. Beverly refuses to let Adam see a new horror film, but he goes behind her back and tricks Pops into taking him to the cinema. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt and Peralta investigate when three valuable antique coins are stolen from the university where Kevin works as a lecturer. Meanwhile, back at the precinct, Jeffords and Santiago get competitive about taking the squad out for lunch

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and the squad must track down a hacker who has infiltrated the precinct's servers, compromising protected information on undercover agents. Rosa deals with relationship issues, while Hitchcock and Scully attempt to cook the perfect lasagne

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the friends find out about Bernadette's big news, they celebrate by getting together for an evening of karaoke. However, Bernadette is upset when Howard freaks out over her announcement as he becomes convinced that he needs to start earning more money. Comedy, Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with guest appearances from Adam West, Wil Wheaton and Stephen Hawking

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Elliot questions whether she should be a doctor, but is annoyed that her personal crisis gets less attention than the Janitor's toilet on the roof. JD is thrilled when Turk asks him to be his best man, but a phone message makes him question their friendship. Guest starring Michael J Fox

programme.title: Scrubs

Guest starring Brendan Fraser (The Mummy) and Tara Reid (American Pie) alongside Zach Braff, Donald Faison and Sarah Chalke

programme.title: Speechless

Ray's run-in with an old love threatens his Quiz Bowl championship chances. Minnie Driver, John Ross Bowie and Micah Fowler star

programme.title: Speechless

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt deals with a personal loss. Jake must decide whether to take Terry or Charles to an exclusive event

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy is back - and this time things between him and Jake are personal. Amy and Charles try to find the perfect new vending machine for the Nine-Nine

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam plans to attend the school dance with Dana, and reluctantly agrees to take dancing lessons with Beverly. Meanwhile, Murray is forced to have the 'talk' with Adam, but he admits that he hasn't spoken to Barry about sex yet. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam worries that sexual tension may develop between him and his long-time friend Emmy. Beverly is caught reading Erica's diary, and vows to trust her daughter instead of snooping in future. However, her new faith is soon taken advantage of. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard has a meeting with Colonel Williams, a representative from the Air Force Department of Material Command, about the gyroscope he invented with Leonard and Sheldon. Penny accidentally reveals that Bernadette is pregnant to their colleagues at work. Dean Norris guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions rise when the guys struggle to complete their Air Force project on time and are forced to work around the clock - leaving Sheldon fighting to stay awake. Penny and Amy attend a university gathering at the home of Bert the geologist. Raj learns Bernadette's true feelings about her pregnancy when he helps her to clear out the spare room for a nursery

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at a classic episode of the soap from 1999. Tony reacts badly when he's put out of business by a rival video store. The Patrick family welcomes Sol home from prison, while Cindy accuses her boyfriend Sean of not taking good care of baby Holly

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The Taskmaster Greg Davies sends fear coursing through the veins of James Acaster, Jessica Knappett, Kerry Godliman, Phil Wang and Rhod Gilbert. In this edition, the challenges include an attempt to cheer up a grumpy traffic warden

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jeffords believes the Pontiac Bandit is up to his old tricks and stealing cars again, but Peralta is convinced he's wrong and attempts to prove it. The rest of the squad battles to keep Shaw's bar a police hangout after some firefighters stake their claim to it

programme.title: Dawn of the Planet of the Apes (2014)
programme.desc: A colony of super-intelligent apes thrives following a global virus outbreak that wipes out much of the human race. A survivor tries to make peace with the leader of the apes, but their efforts to reach an understanding are threatened by warmongers on both sides. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Andy Serkis, Jason Clarke and Gary Oldman

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny worries about the consequences of spending the night with Raj, and Leonard's reaction confirms her worst fears. Meanwhile, Sheldon is more interested in the upcoming paintball competition, and tries to refocus the boys' attentions as they argue over the previous evening's activities. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is caught in a battle of wills between Sheldon and Penny, while Leonard tries to reignite his long-distance relationship with Priya, who has moved back to India. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. Anna Richardson hosts

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The Taskmaster Greg Davies sends fear coursing through the veins of James Acaster, Jessica Knappett, Kerry Godliman, Phil Wang and Rhod Gilbert. In this edition, the challenges include an attempt to cheer up a grumpy traffic warden

programme.title: Angel

Meanwhile, Cordelia's constant visions begin to take their toll on her health, and Darla meets a shaman in Nicaragua to discuss a very unusual problem. Supernatural drama, with David Boreanaz

programme.desc: A festive edition of the dating show in which singletons meet up with possible partners at a restaurant in the hope of finding love, before deciding whether they want to take things further. This time, former bodybuilding champion Kieran goes on a date with 23-year-old student nurse Abi. Meanwhile, 67-year-old Suzy is set up with Fred, a fellow divorcee who is looking for some excitement in his life, and single mother Amy meets 29-year-old Geordie Scott

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Barry starts checking out the best medical schools, Lainey reveals she has won a scholarship to art college. Erica and Adam start to suspect that Murray loves the family dog Lucky more than them

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry plans big romantic gestures for Lainey on high school prom night, while Erica and Geoff try to attend the event together, but things don't go as planned. Adam is thrilled when a nerdy but cute girl asks him out, but is horrified when Beverly gets involved

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to two restaurants - Giuseppi's and Sante La Brea - to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress? Plus, an update on Finn McCool's from season one

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jersey's Spanish Pavilion, which is run by two warring brothers whose staff spend more time using their mobile phones than working. The chef plans to turn the eatery's fortunes around, and starts by giving the dining room and menu a modern makeover

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost offers advice to the Garcias, with stay-at-home dad Anthony struggling to understand his new role as primary caregiver and Bethanie unable to find a work/life balance

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan loves music as well as his home town of Stoke-on-Trent. So, when bride-to-be Beccie gives him free rein to plan their wedding, he decides to honour them - and not her - with nuptials based on the rare grooves of Northern Soul. Will this groom be able to deliver a swinging day, or will his bride be swinging wildly at him?

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Gavin attempts to pull off a Thai-themed wedding in Somerset, while his fiancee Sophie dreams of a rustic, romantic affair

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Paris reveals some distressing news, and Verity decides that she must confront Charlie about it. Sam and Tiff enjoy becoming closer friends, much to the amusement of Reza and Alex

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present this year's semi-final, the last four bakers facing three patisserie challenges to decide who will be going through to next week's final. The signature round features plenty of alcohol, while the technical challenge sets the bakers the task of making pastry horns. Finally, for the Showstopper, they must use all the precision they can muster to construct a cake made entirely from smaller cakes

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers

Erica deliberately makes a mess of her interview at one university so that she will only receive an offer from her first choice of college, but her plan goes badly awry. programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Sheldon start a gossip experiment to see how quickly rumours spread among the gang, while Howard tells his friends he is planning to propose to Bernadette - not realising Raj is wrestling with his own feelings for her. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Mayim Bialik and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Penny use Bernadette to spy on Leonard and Priya after the couple invite her and Howard to dinner. An experimental drug helps Raj overcome his fear of talking to women, but proves more effective than he had expected. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

He and his wife Penny want to build a cutting-edge family home, with a drive-in basement, passenger lift and accessible kitchen and bathroom. programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond take on a challenge to find an alternative to the expensive diesel-fuelled hatchbacks driven by British police officers. Alan Carr and Justin Lee Collins take up the gauntlet as the Stars in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef continues his exploration of the Far East's most diverse food cultures, travelling down the Mekong River to Vietnam, where the local diet features an abundance of herbs, freshwater fish and flavoursome soups. As well as following in the footsteps of his hero Graham Greene in Saigon, he is reunited with a former employee in Hanoi to try out the capital city's street food, and samples the produce on offer at the night-time stalls in Bangkok, Thailand

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May explore the old adage that having owned an Alfa Romeo is the sign of a real automobile addict, testing out three second-hand models, each bought for less than £1,000. programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade heads to the Canary Islands for a packed mini-break with actress and writer Lena Dunham, the star and creator of American comedy drama Girls. In the north of the island, Richard and Lena visit a guachinche pop-up restaurant, where they have goat stew before exploring the barren lunar-like landscape around the volcanic Mount Teide and spend the evening stargazing. There is also a sculpture tour, including works by Henry Moore and Joan Miro, as well as layered coffee, a spot of golf and a search for whales

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy get a family pet in an attempt to teach the children to be more responsible. But as ever, things do not quite work out as planned. Domestic comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton, with a guest appearance from former EastEnders actress Annette Badland (Aunt Babe)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star in the domestic comedy which sees the couple appear to go from one disaster to the next, while coping with their three kids, Lucy's disapproving parents, Lee's feckless dad Frank and their world-weary friends Toby and Anna. This week the couple become addicted to a TV box set, causing them to cancel dinner with Toby and Anna at the last moment. But when they lie about the reason, it only succeeds in opening up a huge can of worms. Domestic comedy, with Hugh Dennis and Abigail Cruttenden

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star in the domestic comedy which sees the couple appear to go from one disaster to the next, while coping with their three kids, Lucy's disapproving parents, Lee's feckless dad Frank and their world-weary friends Toby and Anna. In this final episode, Lucy begins to consider having a breast augmentation, encouraged by Anna, wondering whether it will help her regain some of the femininity she felt in her youth. With Abigail Cruttenden and Hugh Dennis

programme.title: Mock the Week

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Rob Beckett, Miles Jupp, Romesh Ranganathan and Tiff Stevenson join regular panellists Hugh Dennis and Andy Parsons to give their irreverent takes on the biggest stories to hit the headlines in June 2015, through stand-up spots and improvised games. Chaired by Dara O Briain

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You

programme.title: Dave Gorman: Modern Life Is Goodish
programme.desc: Dave Gorman performs jokes involving money as he continues his series of witty stand-up shows

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy get a family pet in an attempt to teach the children to be more responsible. But as ever, things do not quite work out as planned. Domestic comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton, with a guest appearance from former EastEnders actress Annette Badland (Aunt Babe)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Lee and Lucy - who is three days overdue with their first baby - find themselves mistakenly caught up in a robbery at a local department store. Alongside them are Lee's dad, Frank, dressed as Santa's elf, Daisy and neighbours Toby and Anna. Locked in and faced with a dangerous armed robber wearing a Father Christmas mask, they have to come up with an escape plan. But will Lee's poorly conceived ideas get them into even more trouble? One-off Christmas special of the comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: David Baddiel shows a readiness to bare his chest and Katy Wix robs a piggy bank. Meanwhile, Alex is powerless in the face of Ed Gamble's creative vision

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Rob Beckett, Milton Jones, Ellie Taylor and Josh Widdicombe join regular panellists Hugh Dennis and Andy Parsons to give their irreverent takes on the biggest stories to hit the headlines, through stand-up spots and improvised games. Chaired by Dara O Briain. From 2015

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Invasion! With Sam Willis
programme.desc: The historian reveals a story of invasion in Britain spanning millennia, beginning with him felling a tree with a flint axe in Kent, and riding an Iron Age chariot. Sam Willis also searches for clues of invasion at Silbury Hill, and tracks down evidence of the Beaker people, who brought ceramics, metalwork and beakers to Britain

programme.title: Invasion! With Sam Willis
programme.desc: Sam Willis tells the story of the Barbary Corsaire pirates who made their headquarters on Lundy Island. He also sheds light on the little-known tale of King Louis the Lion, a French King who invaded Britain in the 13th century

programme.title: Medieval Dead
programme.desc: The team investigates the origins of a hill fort which was long thought to be Iron Age, but is now believed to be an even older defence against invasion

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The drop in morale of Churchill's forces following the fall of France to Nazi forces during the Second World War, and how the Dunkirk evacuation and the Battle of Britain helped to restore British confidence. Plus, America's reasons for initially refusing to enter the conflict

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two
programme.desc: An examination of how Leon Degrelle and an array of Finns, Estonians and fellow Belgians joined German volunteer brigades to hold off the Red Army on the Eastern front during the Second World War and enabled 56,000 men to escape

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A ghostly house in a tropical paradise that is still feared by the locals and a pioneering complex marked by both glory and tragedy that will soon to be lost forever

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo ventures once more on to the European rail network to retrace journeys featured in George Bradshaw's 1913 publication Continental Guide, beginning by travelling through Russia. He starts in the industrial city of Tula, before visiting Leo Tolstoy's former home of Yasnaya Polyana and learning how the author's life and works were intertwined with the railways. Michael then boards the train that runs from the Caspian Sea to Moscow, where he performs an important role in a dramatic opera at the Bolshoi Theatre, before exploring the beauty and history of St Petersburg and riding on the first railway ever built in Russia

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Lyme Park in Cheshire, famously the location for the 1995 TV adaptation of Pride and Prejudice. Items brought in to be valued include a pair of pistols used to protect royal mail coaches from highwaymen, a tea caddy disguised as a pile of books, and a portrait of actress Sarah Bernhardt that once belonged to Elton John

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: Staff carry out their duties through the night, with Reading's duty station manager Gary Brownlie trying to stop students dodging train fares. Paul Eddolls works a typical late shift in Bristol, where sleepy passengers and drunken revellers make his job difficult, and a service disruption causes chaos for Dean Haynes at London's busy Ealing Broadway station

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: Nato's Airborne Warning and Control System, known as Awac, a cutting-edge aircraft with a huge radar dome mounted on its roof that enables pilots to spot hostile intrusion as they protect state borders of the countries in the Nato alliance. One of the most complex surveillance aircrafts in the world, it is able to seek out, locate, and defend against threats - no matter how fast moving or well hidden

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The desert town that faced a disaster of biblical proportions. Plus, scorched remains that speak of imprisonment and torture and vast coastal ruins that reveal a past once wiped from history

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The people responsible for tracking down war criminals who had evaded capture, beginning with the US army task force in charge of locating German scientists

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: An account of Hitler's decision to invade the Soviet Union, which produced an initial series of dazzling victories until the harsh winter of 1941 took hold, with fatal consequences for the ill-equipped German army. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Steered by his 1913 Bradshaw railway guide, Michael Portillo takes the train down the spine of Italy as he travels from Rome to Sicily. He begins by weaving among the capital city's landmarks on the back of a 1950s Vespa, before boarding the train south to Naples, where he finds out about the first railway to be built in the country, and ventures into the crater of Mount Vesuvius. He takes a detour to the island of Capri, before finishing his journey in the ancient hilltop town of Taormina

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up some 'emerging' sporting classics from the Far East when three Datsun Zs appear, and an unusual lot arrives that run on caterpillar tracks not wheels

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Examining a ghost island once belonging to a secretive country on the fringes of Europe. Also, a haunting site in the UK with evidence of strange burial practices

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How the morale of the Third Reich, boosted by Germany's initial military successes, was shattered by the devastating defeat at Stalingrad, relentless Allied bombing raids and an attempt on Hitler's life. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The desert town that faced a disaster of biblical proportions. Plus, scorched remains that speak of imprisonment and torture and vast coastal ruins that reveal a past once wiped from history

programme.title: Invasion! With Sam Willis
programme.desc: The historian discovers French plans to invade Britain by balloon, the subterranean fortress built for troops in the 19th century when invasion paranoia was at fever pitch, and examines the rich legacy of the Huguenots

programme.title: Monster Ships
programme.desc: How the world's biggest ships manage to get the job done, beginning with the Saipem 7000 as she sails from Stavanger in Norway to the Ula Oilfields

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Archaeological series. In this special edition, Tony Robinson traces the history of the controversial Sevso treasure

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: An account of Hitler's decision to invade the Soviet Union, which produced an initial series of dazzling victories until the harsh winter of 1941 took hold, with fatal consequences for the ill-equipped German army. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.desc: The people responsible for tracking down war criminals who had evaded capture, beginning with the US army task force in charge of locating German scientists

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The desert town that faced a disaster of biblical proportions. Plus, scorched remains that speak of imprisonment and torture and vast coastal ruins that reveal a past once wiped from history

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Steered by his 1913 Bradshaw railway guide, Michael Portillo takes the train down the spine of Italy as he travels from Rome to Sicily. He begins by weaving among the capital city's landmarks on the back of a 1950s Vespa, before boarding the train south to Naples, where he finds out about the first railway to be built in the country, and ventures into the crater of Mount Vesuvius. He takes a detour to the island of Capri, before finishing his journey in the ancient hilltop town of Taormina

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hillsborough Castle in Northern Ireland is the first stop for Fiona Bruce and the experts - and there are a couple of VIP guests as Her Majesty the Queen and Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh, meet three of the specialists, who advise them about a curious collection in the royal residence. Items brought in by the public include a Shirley Temple doll, a mysterious lock and key and a vintage wine bottle. Plus, in a new feature looking at memorable moments from past series, there's a return visit from the proud owners of a recently restored Cartier watch

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: Racegoers head to two major meetings at Newbury Racecourse, with the company sending staff to a usually unmanned station to help keep things running smoothly. Paddington controller Dave Turner ensures that the correct train arrives at the intended platform at the right time, and the emergency services are called into action at the Penzance depot

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A floating bridge in Seattle, one of the longest such structures in the world, intended to connect the growing suburb of Bellevue with the high-tech downtown heart of the city. Plus, Albert Zwueste is on the Dutch Caribbean island of Curacao exploring one of the world's oldest surviving floating bridges, which helped inspire and inform the Seattle project

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The underground base with the power to destroy a nation, the site linked with an attempt to kill a vicious dictator, and an ancient world discovered in the open American wilderness

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The story of Hitler's personal secretary Martin Bormann and the efforts to track him down. With insufficient evidence to confirm the Nazi official's death, the International Military Tribunal at Nuremberg tried him in absentia during 1946 and eventually sentenced him to death. Despite extensive efforts, he was never found and was eventually presumed to have died in May 1945

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this documentary chronicling events leading up to the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbour on December 7, 1941, and the subsequent collapse of unprepared British forces before the advancing enemy in Singapore. Includes interviews with veterans from both sides

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo uses his 1913 copy of Bradshaw's Continental Railway Guide to explore Poland. He begins in the capital Warsaw, where he takes to the floor to dance to one of Chopin's polonaises with high-school students rehearsing for their leavers' ball, before discovering how the former industrial city of Lodz supplied the vast Russian empire of the early 20th century. He then heads to Poznan and rides one of the few remaining steam-powered commuter trains, visits a factory in Wroclaw that manufactures car bodies for locomotives, and ends his journey in Krakow, where he takes a tour in an iconic vehicle of the communist era

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents an episode from RAF Coningsby, an operational air base in Lincolnshire, where she takes to the sky in a Dakota aircraft and examines some air force memorabilia including a teddy bear that was on board one of the Dambuster planes and designs for the Vulcan bomber. Items brought in to be valued include a painting by John Singer Sergeant, a crystal decanter and an officer's coat from the American Civil War

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up some 'emerging' sporting classics from the Far East when three Datsun Zs appear, and an unusual lot arrives that run on caterpillar tracks not wheels

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: A look at the early stages of genocide at the camp, examining the role of commander Rudolf Hoess in the process. Despite later claiming he was only following orders, Hoess was instrumental in the development of Auschwitz for mass murder, arranging for Soviet prisoners to be brought in as construction workers and scouring Europe for more victims to kill. Featuring contributions from survivors

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The underground base with the power to destroy a nation, the site linked with an attempt to kill a vicious dictator, and an ancient world discovered in the open American wilderness

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The story of Hitler's personal secretary Martin Bormann and the efforts to track him down. With insufficient evidence to confirm the Nazi official's death, the International Military Tribunal at Nuremberg tried him in absentia during 1946 and eventually sentenced him to death. Despite extensive efforts, he was never found and was eventually presumed to have died in May 1945

programme.title: Invasion! With Sam Willis
programme.desc: The historian discovers French plans to invade Britain by balloon, the subterranean fortress built for troops in the 19th century when invasion paranoia was at fever pitch, and examines the rich legacy of the Huguenots

programme.title: Monster Ships
programme.desc: How the world's biggest ships manage to get the job done, beginning with the Saipem 7000 as she sails from Stavanger in Norway to the Ula Oilfields

programme.desc: The team investigates the origins of a hill fort which was long thought to be Iron Age, but is now believed to be an even older defence against invasion

programme.title: Trading History
programme.desc: The historical significance of artefacts for sale at auction, beginning with items associated with Queens Victoria and Elizabeth II and the German battleship Bismarck

programme.title: Sounds of the Sixties
programme.desc: Recalling a decade in British music, with archive performances from the early stages of the 'swingin' era, featuring music by by rock, pop and R'n'B artists including the Springfields, the Shadows, the Beatles and the Rolling Stones

programme.title: Sounds of the Sixties
programme.desc: More pop, rock and rhythm and blues from the archives, featuring appearances by the Rolling Stones, the Dave Clark Five, the Seekers and the Byrds from 1964 and '65

programme.title: Sounds of the Seventies
programme.desc: Studio and concert performance from the decade, featuring the Who, Queen, David Bowie, the Moody Blues, the Rolling Stones and Elton John

programme.title: Sounds of the Seventies
programme.desc: Studio and concert performances from the decade, featuring Aretha Franklin, Bill Withers, Rose Royce, the Real Thing and Michael Jackson

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On his journey from Swindon to Penzance, Michael Portillo explores Torquay, where he meets meteorologist David Braine to find out whether the town is Britain's warmest spot. He then takes a trip on the Paignton and Dartmouth Steam Railway, and spends the night at the Royal Castle Hotel in Dartmouth, where he learns about the town's naval past. After sailing up the River Dart he arrives in Totnes, and discovers the community's efforts to become more environmentally friendly

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo spends the night in a converted post office railway carriage before continuing his journey from Swindon to Penzance, heading for Par, where he meets miner Ivor Bowditch to explore the largest clay mine in the world. In Mevagissey he discovers how the methods for pilchard fishing have changed over the years, and on a visit to the Lost Gardens of Heligan, Michael learns about the 1,000-acre estate's history

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo undertakes the last leg of his journey from Swindon to Penzance. He travels to Perran Sands, where he searches for the lost church of St Piran, a place believed to be one of the earliest Christian sites in England. In Redruth, he explores the remains of the Cornish tin industry, before heading to St Ives, where he spends the night in Treganna Castle. The former politician finishes his trip in Penzance, discovering how railways link remote communities to the rest of the country

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the first leg of a journey to London from Buxton, Derbyshire, where he discovers how railways inspired a building craze and boosted tourism. In the Peak District, he joins a team of volunteers repairing damage done to ancient peat landscapes during the Industrial Revolution, and near the quarries of Stanton Moor he learns how trains transported Derbyshire's famous sandstone all over England

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the second leg of his journey from Buxton to London, stopping at Cromford, Derbyshire, where Bradshaw's railway guide reports Richard Arkwright built his original cotton mill. He also visits Derby to take a walk through Britain's first public park, and heads for Burton-on-Trent for a tour of Burton Bridges Breweries

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo's journey from Buxton to London continues in Walsall, where he visits a leather business that still supplies the Queen with saddlery. He then explores how the centre of Birmingham has changed since Bradshaw's times, and is taught how to cook a curry by the owner of a leading Indian restaurant. Finally, he heads to the village of Bournville, where he learns how the railway transformed the fortunes of the Cadbury brothers

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: Exploring the wildlife and culture of the Southeast Asian nation. The first episode examines the south of the country, a popular tourist destination for Westerners, and examines the role of spirituality in daily life. Narrated by Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: In central Thailand's forests, fertile plains and even its city streets, nature finds a way of living alongside people, and spirituality can be found in human and animal relationships, both likely and unlikely. This bustling region is known as the nation's rice bowl - but even here, there are magical places to be found. Narrated by Sophie Okonedo

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay gives his advice to Paul Bazzini, an award-winning chef from New York who now owns a restaurant in Ridgewood, New Jersey. Paul confesses he has lost his passion for food and is struggling to keep up with the business, a situation that seems evident to other members of staff, his wife and customers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mette and Chris from Brighton want a holiday home on Majorca, so Scarlette Douglas lines up five properties for them and their two children on the north coast of the island

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Pub landlady Alison seeks a home on the Costa Dorada in Spain. Famous for its golden beaches, the region has stunning river valleys and traditional hilltop villages, where Alison would love to buy a smallholding and keep chickens. With five options up his sleeve, Jonnie Irwin helps Alison and her friend Theresa, who's come along for support, find the perfect property for her £70,000 budget

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Following Sarah Beeny and her family as they relocate from London to Somerset, renovating a semi-derelict former dairy farm into their dream family home

programme.title: Red Sparrow (2018)
programme.desc: Ballerina Dominika Egorova is recruited to a Russian intelligence service, where she is forced to use her body as a weapon. Her first mission, targeting a CIA agent, threatens to unravel the security of both nations. Spy thriller, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Joel Edgerton and Matthias Schoenaerts

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Home County Cartel
programme.desc: Part one of two. The documentary focuses on the importation of huge quantities of Class A drugs, following the work of covert detectives from the Eastern Region Special Operation Unit. A consignment weighing more than 100kg has been intercepted while being imported into the UK from Europe. To reveal who is behind this, an undercover operation is authorised to closely monitor the shipment, using audio and visual equipment, as it travels to its final destination at a farm in rural Hertfordshire

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Home County Cartel
programme.desc: Part two of two. The covert team tries to find the true identity of Jaguar Palace, as well as the evidence to link the suspect directly to the drug-importing conspiracy. The detectives begin a nerve-shredding wait for the criminal network to set up its lucrative operation again, and stand ready to strike against the ringleaders when it does

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Following Sarah Beeny and her family as they relocate from London to Somerset, renovating a semi-derelict former dairy farm into their dream family home. In the second episode, Sarah and her husband Graham await news from the local council, while the family get to work planting 1,000 young trees they have bought to improve the biodiversity on the farm

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores London's Restoration history, including the founding of the Royal Society and the violent dark side behind Charles II's carefully crafted public image. She visits St Paul's Cathedral, reveals how women performed on stage for the first time during this period, and uncovers shocking details of the slave trade at the National Maritime Museum. Plus, a look at parallels between the plague that struck London during the 1660s and the Covid-19 pandemic

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Aspiring glamour model Annierose Crone hosts the first dinner party in Coventry, and prepares a menu featuring sausages in the starter, main course and dessert. Her guests are cleaner and wrestler Joanne Edwards, pub manager Tony Jackson, chocolatier Chris Tabor and salon owner Michelle Russell

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Master chocolatier Chris Tabor hosts the second dinner party in Coventry, but his elaborate menu provokes some mixed reactions from the others, and he ends up falling out with pub landlord Tony Jackson

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Part-time pro-wrestler Joanne Edwards hosts the third party in Coventry. Her risky strategy is to prepare dishes she has never made before, and the lack of knowledge shows when she manages to injure herself twice while cooking the meal

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Publican Tony Jackson hosts the fourth dinner party in Coventry. His guests have high expectations for his pub-themed event and while Michelle Russell thinks he may be the man to beat, Chris Tabor tries to spoil the evening by criticising every aspect of the meal

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hair salon owner Michelle Russell hosts the final dinner party in Coventry, and the evening begins with champagne in the garden, but the proceedings take a turn for the worse when Tony Jackson decides to irritate the other guests and Joanne Edwards makes a shocking announcement. The winner of the £1,000 prize is also announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps a photographer to find a new home on the Greek island of Skopelos in time for his 60th birthday, showcasing five properties on a budget of £120,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps newlyweds Iris and Alan Ford from Kent, who with a budget of £300,000 are hoping to split their retirement between the UK and the island of Tobago in the Caribbean

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet up for a final showdown, as Justin gives Tina and Kay a platform for their feedback about noisy trains and seeks to know more about Raqeeb's problems with his shower. Tina and Kay want to clear up Raqeeb and Raj's cleanliness comments before discussing what really happened at breakfast. After dramatic discoveries and frank exchanges, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Debbie and Nigel start landscaping their five-acre grounds and risk a flat-pack fall out. Also requiring urgent attention is the tired roof terrace at the rear of the chateau which currently isn't watertight. Sarah and George run into trouble with the chateau's electrics as they host their first-ever wedding. Dick gets to work re-levelling the chateau's long driveway and Stephanie turns her attention to a new, modern apartment in the chateau's old stables

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert becomes convinced he has found the perfect woman, but Ray witnesses something that makes him think otherwise. Brad Garrett and Ray Romano star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie starts wearing glasses and begins to see the family in a new light, while Robert gets back together with Amy and invites her to a Thanksgiving dinner. Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Chris and Kay from Buckinghamshire are searching for their perfect retirement home to share with their two cats. The only hitch is that they can't agree on where it should be. Kay loves the stunning scenery of Cardigan Bay in west Wales, while sun-worshipper Chris would rather move to the beautiful Mar Menor in Spain. Jasmine Harman selects three properties for their £150,000 budget in Wales, but Jonnie Irwin has three cracking options in the Mar Menor

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lynne and her sister Debbie seek the perfect place on the beautiful Costa Teguise in Lanzarote. After Lynne's husband Frankie was diagnosed with a terminal illness, Lynne took early retirement to care for him. A holiday home in the sun has been a lifelong dream for this couple, and with Frankie's illness they don't want to wait any longer. With a budget of £150,000, Ben Hillman lines up five suitable properties for them to choose between

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George's continued renovation mission takes him to Moseley and Wheaton Aston in the West Midlands. He begins with a conversion to unite upstairs and downstairs flats in an Arts and Crafts building, although one of his suggestions leaves the owners speechless. He also visits an 18th-century pub that has fallen victim to some dodgy DIY - and quickly devises a clever plan to make the most of the period features

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Featuring the stories of three patients filmed at St George's in south London, including a retired air stewardess who was rushed into hospital after seriously cutting her leg as her best friend's 70th birthday party. Monica arrives in A&E with hip pain, and talks about growing up in Trinidad and her early years working in the UK as a nurse, and patient Christine has stroke-like symptoms and is suffering with tremors on the left side of her body

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A look back at previous first dates that did not go smoothly, including make-up artist Demi's awkward meeting with 29-year-old Danny, and retired NHS counsellor Elaine's date with music producer Steve, which appeared to be going well until it came to settling the bill. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Magistrate Diane Whittaker hosts the final night of the competition in Essex, and hopes to introduce a touch of sophistication by making it a black-tie occasion. She also transforms her diners' hair, which proves to be a success, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Paul discovers that an unruly tenant may be planning to do a runner, Harrow Council discovers 30 people in a three-bedroom house, and shopowner Pauline is threatened when squatters invade her property

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Essex unit pulls over an angry driver and a car thief leads officers on a cross-country chase. The air support team pursues an athletic burglar and a vehicle with a burst tyre, while other interceptors search for a lost key and are forced to arrest a colleague

programme.desc: A drug dealer who has been driving dangerously reveals a surprising amount of information when he is pulled over, and friends try to baffle the pursuit team by changing their names. Meanwhile, an officer has a shock in store for a law-breaking driver

programme.desc: Documentary about some of the nation's wealthiest buy-to-let landlords, who have made a fortune by buying up former council homes, and renting them out to those in need. Among those featured is a Manchester property magnate who buys properties in the city's less desirable areas and rents them to students at up to £400 a month for a room, a London estate agent who only deals in former council properties, and a Kent man who grew up in a council house, and recognises the quality of the construction

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: It is McMeer's birthday and Zigby and Bertie want to give him the best celebration ever

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: The boys help an explorer whose plane has crashed into a mountain - but to fix it, they will have to retrieve the propeller from a yeti

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: A witch makes a magic model of the town, and anything she does to the miniature will happen in real life as well

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: To treat Akka's heavy cold, Nils calls on Lina who knows a remedy. However, they are ambushed in the forest

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Martin has a nightmare but it is so real that he is sure something bad is going to happen to the flock

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: A south London couple gamble their savings in an attempt to raise enough cash to buy their dream home in the countryside. The plan is to renovate their two-bedroom former council flat so they can make money by renting it out for as much as possible. Property developer Sarah Beeny keeps an eye on their progress

programme.title: Can't Bully Me
programme.desc: Documentary following four youngsters suffering from the traumatic effects of bullying as they attend the Red Balloon Learner Centres in Cambridge and north-west London, which deal with children unable to attend school due to past experiences. The film charts their progress as they overcome fears and rebuild their confidence to return to education and mainstream life

programme.title: Meet the Lords
programme.desc: The Government threatens to trim the Lords' powers if they rebel again and Lord Strathclyde publishes his review into the powers the upper house have to block legislation. Cameras follow Labour peer Alf Dubs as he attempts to push through an amendment to the Immigration Bill to allow unaccompanied refugee children into the country, while Admiral Alan West isn't happy about a public poll that has voted overwhelmingly to name a new polar research ship Boaty McBoatface and raises a question about it

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: It is five months since the Hollands moved into Eaton Place, and Rose is officially installed as housekeeper, while Lady Agnes has manoeuvred the house to the centre of London society - and her joy is compounded by the news she is pregnant. But storm clouds are gathering in Europe, and Lady Persie falls under the spell of Oswald Mosley and his British Union of Fascists, forming an alliance that will drag her into moral and physical peril. Keeley Hawes, Jean Marsh and Claire Foy star

programme.title: In the Doghouse (1961)
programme.desc: A newly qualified vet struggles to compete against an unscrupulous rival. Comedy, starring Leslie Phillips, Peggy Cummins, Hattie Jacques and James Booth

programme.title: The October Man (1947)
programme.desc: A chemist with suicidal tendencies is falsely accused of murder - and his precarious mental state is further upset by taunts from the real killer. Psychological thriller, adapted from a novel by Eric Ambler, starring John Mills, Joan Greenwood and Joyce Carey

programme.title: Drive My Car
programme.desc: Short film parodying 1970s car adverts

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb advises a couple looking for a holiday home in Cyprus for under £70,000, weighing up the pros and cons of a mountain lodge, a 200-year-old village house and a luxury villa

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: Can't Bully Me
programme.desc: Documentary following four youngsters suffering from the traumatic effects of bullying as they attend the Red Balloon Learner Centres in Cambridge and north-west London, which deal with children unable to attend school due to past experiences. The film charts their progress as they overcome fears and rebuild their confidence to return to education and mainstream life

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Patients suffering with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, to find out to what extent specially tailored food treatment programmes can help. Specialist dieticians aim to integrate certain food in the patient's diet to assess the beneficial health properties of food, while simultaneously discrediting widely-held old wives' tales.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Comedy set in a DIY shop where the customer is always wrong. Martin Freeman, Ken Morley and Peter Serafinowicz star

programme.title: My Saviour (2019)
programme.desc: A woman whose life is in disarray is attacked by a local gang, only for a mysterious stranger to come to her rescue. She forms an intense relationship with her rescuer, but their close bond sends her on a disturbing journey into a nightmarish world of violence and abuse. Drama, starring Bayley Freer and Steven Murphy

programme.title: Jasper Jones (2017)
programme.desc: When a town outcast suspected of murder shows 14-year-old Charlie Bucktin a dead body, the teenager attempts to find the killer. Mystery thriller, starring Levi Miller, Aaron McGrath and Angourie Rice

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Norwich couple Simon and Caitlin embark on an ambitious project under the watchful eye of expert Sarah Beeny. They plan to buy a former council house, invest all their savings and completely renovate it in the hope that a subsequent sale will raise enough money to move onto the next rung of the property ladder

programme.title: Drive My Car

programme.desc: Tourists take a journey abroad, with unpopular travellers being sent home and replaced along the way

programme.desc: The lively zebra gets into trouble when he agrees to make McMeer disappear

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny meets a Tonbridge family who have resigned themselves to life on a building site as they attempt to modernise and extend their three-bedroom bungalow in the hope of moving up the property ladder

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Patients suffering with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, to find out to what extent specially tailored food treatment programmes can help. Specialist dieticians aim to integrate certain food in the patient's diet to assess the beneficial health properties of food, while simultaneously discrediting widely-held old wives' tales.

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Dramatisation of the trial of Luftwaffe chief and designated successor to Hitler, Hermann Goering. The larger-than-life character was renowned for his charisma and flamboyance, but also as one of the most unrepentant and ruthless of all Nazis. Having aimed to use the courtroom as a means of rehabilitating the fascist regime, it was only at a late stage that he was forced to concede defeat. Robert Pugh stars

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Lady Persie's life has become increasingly complex, as she continues her illicit affair and pursues her right-wing political interests with little regard for the potential danger to those she loves. Meanwhile, Lady Agnes prepares for motherhood by having her picture taken by celebrated photographer Cecil Beaton - a visit that causes excitement for one particular member of the downstairs staff - and Sir Hallam finds himself dragged into the crisis surrounding the abdication of Edward VIII facing the British monarchy. Keeley Hawes, Ed Stoppard, Anne Reid and Claire Foy star in the period drama

programme.title: Operation Cupid (1960)
programme.desc: A Cockney wide boy is running a struggling matrimonial agency. When a wealthy widow turns up looking for a husband, he sees the chance to become rich by posing as a South African millionaire and romancing her himself. Comedy, starring Charles Farrell, Avice Landone and Wallas Eaton

programme.title: Passport to Pimlico (1949)
programme.desc: The residents of a London suburb discover documents proving their neighbourhood is not part of Britain, and declare independence. Appointing their own head of state, they begin erecting borders as the government resorts to desperate measures to bring the community back under British rule. Ealing comedy, starring Stanley Holloway and Margaret Rutherford

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Forest Hill, Hither Green and Cubitt Town. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: The Orchard
programme.desc: On a small Caribbean island, a Rastafarian and two colleagues are nurturing a plot of land to grow exotic foods despite tough conditions and the devastating effects of hurricanes

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Dramatisation of the trial of Luftwaffe chief and designated successor to Hitler, Hermann Goering. The larger-than-life character was renowned for his charisma and flamboyance, but also as one of the most unrepentant and ruthless of all Nazis. Having aimed to use the courtroom as a means of rehabilitating the fascist regime, it was only at a late stage that he was forced to concede defeat. Robert Pugh stars

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The story of the musical, an art form that emerged from vaudeville, operetta, burlesque and the British music hall. Featuring a script by Stephen Sondheim

programme.title: Hoodluck (2020)
programme.desc: In the heart of southeast London, winning the lottery rarely happens, but then three guys - Solse, Festa and Kevin - come across a 'Be Lucky' lottery ticket in a stolen handbag

programme.title: Abraham's Point (2008)
programme.desc: A man who left his childhood home in Wales 15 years previously decides to face up to his troubled past. He steals a grandfather clock and takes it on a journey across the country, intending to return the vintage timepiece to his father, who is dying. Drama, starring Mackenzie Crook and Joseph Milson

programme.title: Emmanuelle in Soho (1981)
programme.desc: A woman seeking fame and fortune in Soho plays a pivotal role in the struggling marriage of a photographer and his wife, and conspires with them on a plot to blackmail a pornography producer. Erotic drama, starring Angie Quick and Julie Lee

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Forest Hill, Hither Green and Cubitt Town. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Tourists take a journey abroad, with unpopular travellers being sent home and replaced along the way

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Tourists take a journey abroad, with unpopular travellers being sent home and replaced along the way

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb presents the best properties she found on her real-estate tour of Florida and the Caribbean in the show that aims to advise British househunters looking for a second home abroad

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Zigby

programme.desc: The zebra invents a game that allows everyone to join in

programme.title: Tashi

programme.title: Nils Holgersson

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
